<current_datetime>2026-05-15T01:02:35.755Z</current_datetime>

Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Build project in Debug with binlog

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Build project in Debug with binlog

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Build project in Release with binlog

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Build project in Release with binlog

data.reasoningText: The user wants me to build the .NET project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binary log (binlog) for each build. Let me first look at the project to understand it, then run the builds.

arguments.description: Build project in Debug with binlog
Build project in Release with binlog

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-4f2ccef801934573afe556666fd33a28 && dotnet build -c Debug -bl:debug.binlog 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Build project in Debug with binlog", "initial_wait": 30}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-4f2ccef801934573afe556666fd33a28 && dotnet build -c Release -bl:release.binlog 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Build project in Release with binlog", "initial_wait": 30}
